claim: The C19/C20 competence probe is DIAGNOSTIC-ONLY: it emits no selector and makes no deployment claim.
Target-oracle labels and source-signal identifiability analyses are diagnostic-only, joined post hoc.
No deployable target-free selector / competence detector is established (diagnostic-only; no-selector gate).
External / new-regime dataset generalization of the probe is NOT established.
Support mismatch as a NATURAL cause in BNCI2014_001 is NOT demonstrated (masks are controlled).
We do NOT make blanket over-claims (all-DG-failure, EEG-transfer-impossibility, or support-aware-invariance worthlessness); the falsification is protocol-scoped (single dataset / single backbone).
